(b) 57% chance of $1,849,000, 43% chance of -$32,629

chosen_full:

Option (a): 36% chance of -$32,629, 64% chance of $11,237

EU(a) = 0.36 * u(-32,629) + 0.64 * u(11,237)

u(-32,629) = 1 - exp(-0.01 * (-32,629)) = 1 - exp(326.29)

exp(326.29) is an astronomically large number, so u(-32,629) is a very large negative number.

u(11,237) = 1 - exp(-0.01 * 11,237) = 1 - exp(-112.37) ~ 1 - 0 = 1

EU(a) = 0.36 * (1 - exp(326.29)) + 0.64 * 1
= 0.36 - 0.36 * exp(326.29) + 0.64
= 1 - 0.36 * exp(326.29)

This is an extremely negative number.

Option (b): 57% chance of $1,849,000, 43% chance of -$32,629

EU(b) = 0.57 * u(1,849,000) + 0.43 * u(-32,629)

u(1,849,000) = 1 - exp(-0.01 * 1,849,000) = 1 - exp(-18,490) ~ 1

u(-32,629) = 1 - exp(326.29) -- extremely negative

EU(b) = 0.57 * 1 + 0.43 * (1 - exp(326.29))
= 0.57 + 0.43 - 0.43 * exp(326.29)
= 1 - 0.43 * exp(326.29)

Comparing:
EU(a) = 1 - 0.36 * exp(326.29)
EU(b) = 1 - 0.43 * exp(326.29)

Since exp(326.29) > 0, we have:
0.36 * exp(326.29) < 0.43 * exp(326.29)

So EU(a) > EU(b).

Option (a) has a higher expected utility.
</think>
{"answer":"a"}
